text:
Map of the Island 島の地図 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots". 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Map of the Island 島の地図 - This card presents the user with a map of the island. There are no markers or towns labelled on the map at the time of purchase. The map will automatically fill itself in as the player explores the island. This card can be purchased by any good card shop for 20,000 (typically found at Masadora).

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.100 :: 島の地図 
島の形だけが示されている地図。実際に行ったり、情報を仕入れることで、中身が自動的に埋まっていく魔法の地図。
|-
![Eng]
|No.100 :: Map of the Island 
Only the form of the island is shown. By moving and stocking information, contents of the map is gradually filled in by magic.
|}
